name: rag-vault
description: Lighthouse — a local-first RAG vault for your documents.
author: Lighthouse
//browserslist: The UI only ever runs in the bundled Tauri webviews (WebView2 / WKWebView / WebKitGTK) and modern desktop browsers for dev — all evergreen. Declaring modern targets stops Next/SWC from emitting the ~110 KB core-js legacy-polyfill bundle (Symbol/URL/Reflect/Promise/fetch are all native here).

scripts.icons: npm install --no-save sharp@^0.33.5 png-to-ico@^2.1.8 && node scripts/gen-icons.mjs
scripts.desktop:build: node scripts/build-ui-static.mjs && cd native && cargo build --release -p lighthouse-desktop
